# CinemaAI Monorepo Scaffold — v0.4 Inferred Draft

> ⚠️ **This is a *constrained* scaffold**: generated solely from PRD v0.3/v0.4 prose (no structured upstream artifacts). All decisions are heuristic, traceable to PRD sections, and marked `inferred` or `pending`. No assumptions made about tech stack, package names, or framework choices.

## 🧩 Inferred Module Topology (from PRD §2.1–2.15)
| PRD Module Name | Inferred Purpose | Layer Responsibility | Inferred Cross-Cutting Needs |
|------------------|-------------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------|
| `script-gen` | LLM-driven script drafting & revision | Domain service + prompt orchestration | Prompt audit logging, tenant-scoped rate limiting |
| `scene-layout` | Shot composition, camera motion, timing | Domain service + media graph engine | Idempotent render job submission, retryable state |
| `voice-synth` | TTS + emotion-aligned voice generation | Adapter service (external API proxy) | Audio output validation, latency SLA tracing |
| `asset-mgmt` | Anime character/prop library + versioning | Repository + metadata indexing | Multi-tenant access control, content moderation hooks |
| `render-orch` | Distributed video synthesis pipeline | Workflow coordinator (temporal/cadence) | Circuit breaker on GPU node failure, render cost auditing |
| `preview-engine` | Real-time WebGL-based scene preview | Edge-optimized frontend adapter | Session-scoped idempotency, client-side tracing context propagation |
| `billing-core` | Usage metering, plan enforcement, invoicing | Domain service + event-sourced ledger | Audit trail immutability, PCI-compliant tokenization hints |
| `user-profile` | Persona modeling, preference learning | Domain model + ML feature store sync | GDPR-compliant data anonymization hooks |
| `prompt-hub` | Shared prompt library with versioning & search | Search-optimized repository | Content safety scanning integration point |
| `scene-registry` | Canonical scene ID, lifecycle, dependencies | Event-sourced registry | Change-data-capture for downstream rendering systems |
| `ai-director` | Multi-agent coordination (script → layout → render) | Orchestration layer (LangChain/RAG-aware) | Trace correlation across LLM/tool calls, latency budgeting |
| `media-transcode` | Format conversion, resolution scaling, codec tuning | Infrastructure adapter | Hardware-accelerated job isolation, quota-based concurrency |
| `feedback-loop` | Viewer reaction ingestion → model fine-tuning | Streaming ingestion (Kafka/Pulsar) | Schema-on-read validation, PII redaction policy hooks |
| `studio-dashboard` | Multi-project analytics, rendering queue monitor | Read-model + real-time dashboard | Role-based view filtering, export audit logging |
| `devops-gateway` | CI/CD for AI model updates + media pipeline deployments | Platform automation layer | Immutable build provenance, signed artifact verification |

## 📦 Recommended Monorepo Layout (Heuristic — Pending N140 Validation)
```
./cinemaai-monorepo/
├── apps/                     # Entry points (CLI, API gateways, dashboard UI)
│   ├── api-gateway/          # REST/gRPC ingress (OpenAPI-first)
│   ├── studio-web/           # Next.js/Remix dashboard
│   └── cli-tools/            # `cinemaai generate`, `cinemaai render` etc.
├── packages/
│   ├── core/                 # Shared domain types, errors, value objects
│   ├── script-gen/           # Module 1
│   ├── scene-layout/         # Module 2
│   ├── voice-synth/          # Module 3
│   ├── asset-mgmt/           # Module 4
│   ├── render-orch/          # Module 5
│   ├── preview-engine/       # Module 6
│   ├── billing-core/         # Module 7
│   ├── user-profile/         # Module 8
│   ├── prompt-hub/           # Module 9
│   ├── scene-registry/       # Module 10
│   ├── ai-director/          # Module 11
│   ├── media-transcode/      # Module 12
│   ├── feedback-loop/        # Module 13
│   ├── studio-dashboard/     # Module 14
│   └── devops-gateway/       # Module 15
├── infra/                    # IaC (Terraform/Pulumi), local dev env (Docker Compose)
├── scripts/                  # Release, lint, typecheck, scaffold generators
├── .github/                  # CI/CD workflows (build/test/deploy per package)
├── tsconfig.json             # Root TS config (if TS inferred); else pyproject.toml/go.mod placeholder
└── README.md                 # Monorepo charter, contribution guide, architecture decision log (ADRs)
```

## ⚙️ Cross-Cutting Infrastructure Anchors (Inferred from PRD §4.2, §5.3, §6.1)
| Concern | PRD Reference | Inferred Anchor | Status |
|---------|----------------|-------------------|--------|
| **Tracing** | "end-to-end latency visibility across LLM → render → preview" | OpenTelemetry auto-instrumentation + custom span attributes (`scene_id`, `prompt_hash`, `tenant_id`) | `inferred` |
| **Logging** | "audit all prompt submissions and render outcomes" | Structured JSON logs (Winston/Zap/Loguru) with `event_type: prompt_submitted|render_started|render_failed` | `inferred` |
| **Idempotency** | "retry scene renders without duplicate billing or duplicated frames" | Idempotency keys derived from `(scene_id, render_params_hash, timestamp_window)` stored in Redis | `inferred` |
| **Auth & Tenancy** | "multi-tenant studio workspaces with isolated assets" | JWT validation middleware + tenant context injection; RBAC via `roles: [editor, director, viewer]` | `inferred` |
| **Rate Limiting** | "prevent prompt flooding during script iteration" | Token bucket per `tenant_id + user_id`, enforced at API gateway | `inferred` |
| **Circuit Breaking** | "fail fast if GPU cluster unreachable during render" | Resilience4j/Sentinel on `render-orch` → `media-transcode` calls | `inferred` |
| **Audit** | "immutable log of all prompt edits and scene approvals" | Write-only append-only log (e.g., Apache BookKeeper or S3 + SQS) with cryptographic hash chain | `inferred` |

## 🛑 Pending Decisions Requiring Upstream Artifacts
- `stack_declaration`: Not inferable — PRD says "Python for ML pipelines", "WebGL for preview", "Rust for transcode kernels" — implies polyglot monorepo. Requires `技术方案分析.md` to resolve primary language and interop strategy (gRPC? WASM? FFI?).
- `package_naming_convention`: PRD uses hyphen-case (`script-gen`) but codegen may prefer PascalCase (`ScriptGen`). Requires `模块边界图.md` or `开发规范.md`.
- `repository_pattern`: `asset-mgmt` and `scene-registry` need persistence — SQL? Vector DB? Object store? Requires `表结构设计草案.sql` or `data-schema.yaml`.
- `CI/CD_strategy`: PRD mandates "model version pinning" and "render pipeline reproducibility" — implies build-time artifact signing and cache key derivation from model+config+code hashes. Requires `CI/CD_pipeline_requirements.md`.

## 📝 Human-Readable Notes
- This scaffold assumes **domain-driven design (DDD)** with bounded contexts aligned to PRD modules — not technical layers (e.g., no separate `api/`, `service/`, `repository/` top-level dirs).
- All cross-cutting concerns are declared as *infrastructure anchors*, not implemented code — actual libraries (e.g., OpenTelemetry SDK, Resilience4j) will be selected in `full_scaffold` mode once stack is declared.
- The `apps/` layer is intentionally thin: business logic lives in `packages/`; `apps/` handles protocol translation, composition, and deployment concerns.
- Next step: Feed this scaffold into `N200 interface-contract-generation` to derive OpenAPI/Protobuf contracts for `api-gateway/` and inter-package gRPC interfaces.
